sections.paragraph:
verb לזבל

to fertilize, manure; chatter, talk nonsense

verb זובל

be fertilized, manured, covered with dung

verb להזדבל

be fertilized, manured, covered with dung

verb לזבל (>>זיבל)

to fertilize, manure; chatter, talk nonsense

masculine noun

garbage, waste, refuse, rubbish, hogwash, junk, ordure, schlock, trash; manure, dung, compost
